catalogData.name: The Earth
properties: Unphased (can't gain Frightened or Wounded status)

powers.name: Animal Form
powers.raw: Animal Form (Major Action, Sustained): Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.
powers.text: Change into animal totem. Retain stats, but can't use attacks/powers.

powers.name: Connected Touch
powers.raw: Connected Touch (Complex Action, Sustained 10 minutes): Target can climb ceilings and walls. Movement Rate limited to Force x2.
powers.text: Target can climb ceilings and walls. Movement Rate limited to Force x2.

powers.name: Craft
powers.raw: Craft (Complex Action, Sustained 1 hour): Make non-functional replica of physical object. Resist: WIL+LOG
powers.text: Make non-functional replica of physical object. Resist: WIL+LOG

powers.name: Gravity Well
powers.raw: Gravity Well (Complex Action, Sustained 10 Minutes): Targets in area gain Prone and Grabbed status. Resist: WIL+BOD
powers.text: Targets in area gain Prone and Grabbed status. Resist: WIL+BOD

powers.name: Primary Spell
powers.raw: Primary Spell (Complex Action, Sustained): Cast Wall at Force

powers.name: Reinforce
powers.raw: Reinforce (Complex Action, Sustained 1 hour): Object or vehicle gains +Force to Health
powers.text: Object or vehicle gains +Force to Health

greatFormPowers.name: Fate's Favor
greatFormPowers.raw: Fate's Favor (Trait): Gain 4 Edge instead of 1
